Name: efficient_attention_cifar
Title: Efficient Attention Mechanisms for Resource-Constrained Visual Recognition
Experiment: Design a lightweight attention module that reduces computational cost by 50% while maintaining accuracy on CIFAR-100. Compare against standard self-attention and recent efficient variants.

Name: adaptive_augmentation
Title: Adaptive Data Augmentation via Online Difficulty Estimation
Experiment: Propose a method that dynamically adjusts augmentation strength based on sample difficulty. Train on CIFAR-10/100 and show improved generalization over fixed augmentation strategies.

Name: multi_scale_features
Title: Hierarchical Multi-Scale Feature Fusion for Image Classification
Experiment: Design a feature fusion module that effectively combines multi-scale representations. Evaluate on CIFAR-100 and analyze which scales contribute most to performance.

Name: knowledge_distillation_vit
Title: Knowledge Distillation from CNN to Vision Transformer
Experiment: Distill knowledge from a pretrained ResNet to a lightweight ViT. Compare different distillation strategies on CIFAR-100 and analyze feature alignment.

Name: contrastive_pretraining
Title: Self-Supervised Pretraining with Improved Contrastive Learning
Experiment: Propose modifications to SimCLR/MoCo for better representation learning. Pretrain on unlabeled data and finetune on CIFAR with limited labels.
